name: Dr. Ayesha Khan
title: Lead Faculty — Occupational Safety & Risk
bio: Dr. Khan has led HSE capability programmes for energy, construction and logistics clients across the GCC and South Asia for more than 18 years. She chairs EIOSH's academic standards board.

name: Sameer Mahmood
title: Principal Trainer — Construction Safety
bio: A site safety practitioner with 15 years on megaprojects across Saudi Arabia, the UAE and Qatar. Sameer specialises in turning audit findings into practical supervisor coaching.

name: Layla Yousuf
title: Lead Tutor — Environment & Sustainability
bio: Layla guides ESG teams at listed companies through ISO 14001 implementation and TCFD-aligned disclosure. She teaches in English and Arabic.

name: Rohan Hassan
title: Senior Trainer — Fire & Emergency
bio: A former municipal fire officer, Rohan designs EIOSH's hands-on fire and emergency drills and has trained response teams for oil & gas, ports and aviation clients.

name: Sara Ahmed
title: Faculty Lead — Leadership & Management
bio: Sara has designed leadership academies for banking and telecoms operators across the GCC, and is an internal verifier for EIOSH's OTHM centre.

name: Abdul Salam
title: Senior Trainer
bio: Abdul Salam working as Equipment inspector

title: Senior Trainer
bio: Hamza Ali Abbasi Working as Senior Equipment Inspector
